steps_raw.instruction: Turn on heat block and set to 37ºC
Label clean 0.5mL microcentrifuge tubes with SampleID by writing on the tube lid directly with a fine point Sharpie
Remove one aliquot each of stock Acil enzyme, stock BseYI enzyme, and NEBuffer r3.1 from the freezer. Vortex gently to mix. Spin down in mini spinner, if necessary
Prepare Acil / BseYI working solution by combining 62µL NEBuffer r3.1, 62µL stock Acil enzyme, and 62µL stock BseYI enzyme in a 1.5mL microcentrifuge tube
Aliquot 1.5µL Acil/BseYI working solution into the bottom of each labeled 0.5mL microcentrifuge tube
Transfer 5µL mtORF amplicons to each 0.5mL tube. Always double check that you are adding the correct sample to the correct tube
Flick each tube gently to mix. Spin down tubes in mini spinner
Incubate all tubes at 37ºC for 60 minutes , then 80ºC for 20 minutes
If possible, visualize digests immediately on gel. Otherwise, store in fridge
